trigger: Bryan asked whether the database works and whether test accounts can be added.

prior_code_change.title: feat: add admin test account seeding

changes: Recorded that production D1 auth is working for the first admin and four fake alpha role accounts.
Documented the credential boundary: passwords stay only in ignored local .secrets storage.
Updated backend setup, master plan, memory, backlog, requirements catalog, artifact registry, rebuild lane log, run log, and this structured manifest.
validation: GET /api/health returned ok=true, environment=production, authMode=hardened_username_password, Google Drive evidence config, and userCount=5.
All four fake .test accounts logged in through /api/auth/login and returned expected roles through /api/auth/me.
No test-account passwords were written into committed docs.
remaining_gaps: Production account lifecycle is not complete: invitation/import, password reset, credential rotation, disabled/reset-required states, and role-management UI remain.
Broader permission/protected-evidence tests are still needed before real student records.
Google Drive server-side upload credential/OAuth is still missing before accepting real file bytes.
next_actions: Add permission/protected-evidence tests for student-own, mentor-assigned, teacher program/cohort, admin, misc-admin, and unauthorized denial.
Implement Drive upload credential/OAuth path and access-controlled evidence retrieval assumptions.
Build account provisioning/import, invitation, password reset, and credential rotation flows.
Extend alpha proposal/review/evidence/audit records into real workflow endpoints.

self_improvement.reason: No automation prompt or config change was needed; this pass clarified and documented live backend state.
